cases.name: Q5-L1-D2: text entered -> RESPONSE matches entered string (string, single)
Q5-L1-D2b: long text -> RESPONSE preserved without truncation

responses.RESPONSE: Over the wintry forest, winds howl in rage with no leaves to blow. The autumn wind rustles through the valley, carrying the scent of pine and the memory of summer days long past.

outcomes.ECHO: Over the wintry forest, winds howl in rage with no leaves to blow. The autumn wind rustles through the valley, carrying the scent of pine and the memory of summer days long past.
